Megan's Cottage

a cozy corner of the internet

About

Hi, I'm Megan. I build and deploy AI/ML and cloud solutions for enterprise organisations across ASEAN at Amazon Web Services.

I studied Information Systems at Singapore Management University with a focus on Business Analytics and Cloud Solutions, and spent a semester at Universität St.Gallen in Switzerland — which is where my love for travelling and extreme adventure started.

Always open to chat about opportunities related to AI, cloud architecture, and pre-sales engineering.

Experience

Sep 2025 — present Delivery Consultant – AI/ML Amazon Web Services
Feb 2025 — Sep 2025 Solutions Architect Amazon Web Services
Jun 2024 — Dec 2024 Business Analyst Accenture
Jul 2023 — Dec 2023 Frontend Engineer Home Team Science & Technology Agency (HTX)
Jan 2023 — Jun 2023 Data Scientist The Boeing Company

For Fun

Hiking mountain trails or anywhere the air feels different from the office.

Slow travel to off-the-beaten-path destinations, swimming laps to reset, and HIIT sessions to stay sharp.

🏖️ Recharge mode: beach + ocean
🏋️ Daily ritual: HIIT or swim
